case_title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES VS. LIAM MURPHY ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, LIAM

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURPHY, LIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 420 EDDY STREET, #40, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94109, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, LIAM
